name: PENDING: Dispel Magic (L3) breaks enemy concentration
description:
PENDING MECHANIC: Dispel Magic spell. The spell is completely missing from the catalog (no entry in `domain/entities/spells/catalog/level-3.ts`) and no delivery handler supports it.

2024 RAW: Dispel Magic (3rd-level Abjuration). Choose one creature, object, or effect within 120 feet. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each higher-level spell, the dispeller makes an ability check (d20 + spellcasting mod) against DC 10+spellLevel. If the check succeeds, the spell ends. Upcasting: dispel at any slot level N and auto-dispel spells of level ≤ N.

This scenario: enemy Wizard concentrates on Bless. PC Wizard casts Dispel Magic at L3 slot. Bless is L1, so auto-dispelled — enemy concentration ends.

To make this pass: (1) Add Dispel Magic to catalog with spell-level + range + targeting. (2) Create a DispelDeliveryHandler that queries the target's active spell effects, identifies concentration spell, compares levels, auto-ends (≤slotLevel) or prompts check (>slotLevel). (3) Clean up zone effects, active effects, and concentration flag when Dispel succeeds.

actions.comment: DM-override: apply Bless concentration to the enemy cleric manually since we're skipping the cast step for determinism.
Placeholder — real engine would use a concentrating-on-spell state via cleric casting Bless on setup. For now this scenario just demonstrates the shape.
PENDING: cast Dispel Magic at L3 on enemy cleric. Bless is L1 → auto-dispelled.

input.text: cast Dispel Magic at Enemy Cleric

actions.comment: Bless concentration ended by Dispel Magic.
Dispel Magic consumed a L3 slot.
